generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our NATO allies have been consistently underfunding their defense commitments for years? While we're carrying the burden, countries like Germany and Italy are only meeting 50% of their agreed spending targets. This isn't just about money—it's about our national security. When allies don't pull their weight, it weakens our collective deterrence. We need to hold them accountable and ensure our alliances are truly reciprocal. #StrongAlliances #NationalSecurityFirst
